text: I feel curious and a bit disoriented by the modern, slightly tilted surroundings. The R+D display intrigues me—it hints at the cutting edge of research and development, evoking an atmosphere of exploration. The vibrant colors and interactive elements stimulate my mind and invite me to contemplate the evolving relationship between humans and technology. I am eager to engage and understand more, yet aware of a subtle tension between innovation and the unfamiliar.
